item.title: About
item.description: I’m an undergrad student in Computer Engineering at UNICAMP that loves programming and solving problems. I’m currently working as a Intern at the Brazilian Center for Research in Energy and Materials (CNPEM), into the Brazilian Synchrotron Light Laboratory (LNLS) / Sirius, on the Scientific Computing Group (GCC). I’m designing solutions in automation and monitoring of high-performance computing machines. Previously, I worked in a project called OpenPOWER@UNICAMP, with IBM. I’ve designed a solution to distribute POWER builds (ppc64le architecture) worldwide, along with CI recipes to build Open Source software.

item.title: How to create a blog with Hugo, Travis CI and GitHub Pages
